hero.title:
Never start a project
blind again.
hero.subtitle: Stop guessing client expectations. BriefFill analyzes your project briefs instantly, highlighting gaps, risks, and missing data before you even send a quote.

howItWorks.title: From Chaos to Clarity
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to a bulletproof project foundation.

step1.label: STEP 01
step1.title: Paste your brief
step1.desc: Drop your client's messy email, PDF, or document link into our secure analyzer. We support any text format.

step2.label: STEP 02
step2.title: AI analyzes for gaps
step2.desc: Our engine scans for missing budget details, timeline ambiguities, technical constraints, and hidden risks.

step3.label: STEP 03
step3.title: Generate questions
step3.desc: Receive a curated list of clarification questions to send back to the client. Professional, surgical, and effective.

comparison.title: Feature comparison
comparison.subtitle: A typical project brief contains only 65% of the information needed to actually start work. We find the remaining 35% before it costs you money.
comparison.beforeExample: "Hey team, we need a simple website for our new product launch next month. Budget is around $50k. Needs to be clean and modern. Let's chat Monday."
comparison.beforeWarn: You have 0% visibility into technical requirements or success metrics.
comparison.afterCriticalDesc: The client hasn't specified the hosting environment. This impacts tech stack decisions.
comparison.afterQuestionDesc: "Could you clarify if the existing AWS infrastructure must be used, or are we free to propose a headless architecture?"
comparison.afterInsightDesc: Budget mention of $50k is 20% lower than previous similar projects for this scope.

pricing.title: Simple, Fair Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. Start for free and upgrade as you grow. 20% off annual.
pricing.compareAll: Compare all features on the full Pricing page →

footer.tagline: Empowering professionals to start every project with absolute clarity. Never work in the dark again.
